mapper.select:
SELECT ci.public_id AS class_public_id, ci.name, COALESCE(ci.description, '') AS description, ui.public_id AS creator_public_id, ci.is_public FROM class_info ci INNER JOIN user_info ui ON ui.id = ci.teacher_user_id AND ui.is_del = 0 WHERE ci.is_del = 0 AND (
1 = 1
ci.is_public = 1
OR ci.teacher_user_id = #{userId} OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM class_member_rel cmr WHERE cmr.class_id = ci.id AND cmr.user_id = #{userId} AND cmr.is_del = 0 )
) ORDER BY ci.id DESC

SELECT ui.public_id AS user_public_id, ui.username, cmr.joined_at FROM class_member_rel cmr INNER JOIN user_info ui ON ui.id = cmr.user_id WHERE cmr.class_id = #{classId} AND cmr.is_del = 0 AND ui.is_del = 0 ORDER BY cmr.joined_at DESC, cmr.id DESC

SELECT ps.public_id AS id, ps.title AS title FROM class_problem_set_rel cpsr INNER JOIN problem_set ps ON ps.id = cpsr.problem_set_id WHERE cpsr.class_id = #{classId} AND cpsr.is_del = 0 AND ps.is_del = 0 ORDER BY cpsr.id DESC

SELECT c.public_id AS id, c.title AS title FROM class_contest_rel ccr INNER JOIN contest c ON c.id = ccr.contest_id WHERE ccr.class_id = #{classId} AND ccr.is_del = 0 AND c.is_del = 0 ORDER BY ccr.id DESC
